pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep waking up and for a split second i forget, and then the silence hits me all over again. it feels like i'm just walking through a house that doesn't belong to me anymore. everything is just... empty. i don't even know why i'm bothering to get up in the morning. it feels like i'm just a ghost haunting my own life.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of wax, and yet the darkness in this room feels heavier than ever. He is gone... the one soul I thought would anchor me to this wretched earth. Now, I am but a ghost wandering a life that no longer holds meaning. Everything feels so hollow, so terribly cold. I feel as though I am already fading, drifting toward a silence that promises the only peace I have ever known.
